headlines.title: Trump: 'We don't want Communists in our country'
headlines.description: During his speech at the Salute to America 250, President Trump said "we don't want Communists in our country."

headlines.title: Weather emergencies disrupt Trump’s Fourth of July plans
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump insisted his much-touted July Fourth show would go on despite severe weather that threw the event into chaos.

headlines.title: Record heat suspected in over 20 deaths as severe weather puts damper on Fourth of July festivities
headlines.description: Record-setting heat is suspected in 25 deaths from the Deep South to the Midwest to the East Coast, authorities said, with the temperature highs also suppressing some Fourth of July celebrations.

headlines.title: Trump warns of communist ‘threat’ and touts America’s strength at Mount Rushmore
headlines.description: No presidential distinction rivals having one’s likeness carved onto Mt. Rushmore — an honor destined to elude Donald Trump, though his allies have pushed for it.

headlines.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address
headlines.description: The New York mayor gave a solidly pro-immigration speech, flanked by recently naturalized citizens, hours before the president plans to give his own address at Mount Rushmore.

headlines.title: Inside Tehran as funeral for late Iranian supreme leader
headlines.description: NBC News’ Richard Engel is in Tehran where huge crowds are gathering for the funeral of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Our team was at the mosque where mourners were chanting “death to America.” The ayatollah was killed in American and Israeli airstrikes at the start of the war earlier this year.

headlines.title: What we’re learning about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding
headlines.description: We’re learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s star-studded wedding at Madison Square Garden last night. One guest says they “laughed” and “danced,” and another describes the performances at the event as “big ones.” And Swift’s team says their friend Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. NBC News’ Emille Ikeda has the latest.

headlines.title: FBI seized more than 600 drones near World Cup events
headlines.description: The FBI says it has seized more than 600 drones near FIFA World Cup sites after authorities determined the devices violated restricted airspace since the tournament began on June 11.

headlines.title: ¡Rugen los Leones del Atlas! Soufiane Rahimi sentencia el 0-3 de Marruecos sobre Canadá
headlines.description: Brahim Díaz asistió al delantero, quien quedó mano a mano frente al arco y sentenció este partido de Octavos de Final de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

headlines.title: Argentina, Messi pushed to the brink by Cape Verde and its 40-year-old goalkeeper
headlines.description: Since this World Cup began, how many people have learned about Cape Verde, the small nation off the west coast of Africa?

headlines.title: Alfaro tras quedar fuera frente a Francia: "Si no era por ese penal, no nos marcaban la diferencia"
headlines.description: El DT destacó el esfuerzo de Paraguay, apuntó que los europeos festejaron como lo hicieron porque el partido les costó, y adelantó que necesita hablar con su familia antes de confirmar si continúa al frente de la selección guaraní.

headlines.title: Jordan Henderson: “No hay nada más grande que jugar contra México en este estadio”
headlines.description: En la rueda de prensa previa al México vs Inglaterra por los octavos de final de la Copa Mundial, el técnico Thomas Tuchel y el mediocampista Jordan Henderson aseguraron que los ingleses están listos para este reto, en un partido que será histórico.
